ActionItems: Confirm October silent-auction night ticket-tier pricing with Patricia Howell before printing invitations.
Reconcile monthly Heartland donor recurring gifts against Stripe payouts on the 1st.
Increase branded-merch inventory ahead of the November fundraiser to close the projected gap.
BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Heartland Free Dental Clinic small-org monthly break-even, prepared by Ryan Torres for the volunteer-coordinator handoff to Patricia Howell.

CurrentState.Note: Numbers reflect the trailing three months (Aug 2025 through Oct 2025). Silent-auction line will spike in the November window per prior year seasonality.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Sponsorship renewals are the single highest-leverage item. Losing two sponsors at the current run rate pushes the clinic into break-even risk before the November spike.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: TotalMonthlyExpenses rises to 7540; requires TotalMonthlyRevenue >= 7540 to hold reserves flat.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Two-additional-sponsor requirement to hold the reserve line. Achievable if silent-auction night grows 8% YoY.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Landlord Rent Increase to $2,650

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: Four-additional-sponsor requirement. Not achievable without adding a corporate-match donor track by Q1 2027.
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Landlord Rent Increase to $2,850
